name: tsl-gradient-wave
summary: An animated gradient wave surface shader written in Three Shading Language.
description: A reference TSL shader for ShaderBase. It renders an animated two-color gradient that waves using sine functions, demonstrating the TSL node-based material system with the createMaterial contract.

outputs.name: surfaceColor
outputs.description: Animated gradient color blended with a sine wave.

recipes.summary: Create a NodeMaterial with an animated gradient wave for use with WebGPURenderer.

attribution.summary: Authored directly in the ShaderBase repository as the reference TSL shader.

provenance.notes: Seed TSL shader authored inside the repository to establish the TSL manifest contract.
